creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yoshihiko Sarumaru, 17.05.10, 18:30h CEST:

> From: Yoshihiko Sarumaru <sarumaru@yamayuri.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, kasahara@nc.kyushu-u.ac.jp
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/141103: net/stone strange behavior on 8.0-RELEASE
> Date: Tue, 18 May 2010 01:20:30 +0900
> 
>  Sorry, I spent too long time.
>  But I already found out what is the problem, and I just about to send a question to net@.
>  The mail I sent to net@ and stable@ should be delivered soon.
>  
>  
>  The following patch stops the continuous recv() error, and it should be required
>  to handle OOB data, but the first recv() error shouldn't be happened.
>  I will report this to developer after I could know select() behavior on FreeBSD 8.x is
>  correct or not. 

OK, please let me know when you want something to be committed.

Regards,
Stefan
